name: Claude Code Greenfield SvelteKit
description: Create a new Gitea repo, scaffold and push a SvelteKit app, validate it in a sandbox, capture browser evidence, and report completion.

document.name: claude-code-greenfield-sveltekit
document.title: Claude Code Greenfield SvelteKit
document.summary: Repo creation, deterministic SvelteKit scaffold/push, sandbox preview, browser capture, and completion report.

input.promptPlaceholder: Describe the app you want. The workflow will derive the app name, headline, description, and UI brief automatically.

model.label: Claude Model
model.description: Model used for all Claude-run steps in this workflow.

with.prompt:
Set up the Git repository for this SvelteKit application.

Use ONE Bash tool call only. Copy this script exactly and do not rename the owner, repo, or paths:

set -euo pipefail
OWNER='{{trigger.owner}}'
REPO='{{trigger.repo}}'
DESCRIPTION='{{trigger.description}}'
API='http://gitea-http.gitea.svc.cluster.local:3000/api/v1'
CLONE_URL="http://giteaadmin:${GITEA_TOKEN}@gitea-http.gitea.svc.cluster.local:3000/${OWNER}/${REPO}.git"

if ! curl -sf "${API}/repos/${OWNER}/${REPO}" -H "Authorization: token ${GITEA_TOKEN}" >/dev/null; then
  curl -sS -X POST "${API}/user/repos" \
    -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
    -H "Authorization: token ${GITEA_TOKEN}" \
    -d "{\"name\":\"${REPO}\",\"description\":\"${DESCRIPTION}\",\"private\":false,\"auto_init\":true}"
fi

rm -rf "/tmp/${REPO}"
git clone "${CLONE_URL}" "/tmp/${REPO}"
cd "/tmp/${REPO}"
git config user.email 'claude@agent.local'
git config user.name 'Claude Code Agent'
if ! git rev-parse HEAD >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  printf '# %s\n' "${REPO}" > README.md
  git add README.md
  git commit -m 'Initial commit'
  git push origin main
fi

git remote -v
git log --oneline -3 || true
echo 'SETUP COMPLETE'

agentConfig.name: claude-setup
agentConfig.instructions: You are setting up a new Git repository. Use curl for API calls and git for repo operations.

agentConfig.name: claude-scaffold-push
agentConfig.instructions: You are scaffolding a SvelteKit application and pushing it to the remote. Execute the provided Bash script exactly in one tool call and do not improvise.

with.command: cd /sandbox/{{trigger.repo}} && ls -la && npm install --prefer-offline 2>&1 && echo install-done

with.prompt: Summarize the completed workflow briefly. Include the repo URL https://gitea-ryzen.tail286401.ts.net/{{trigger.owner}}/{{trigger.repo}}, mention that the generated app was pushed to main before sandbox validation, and note that browser capture artifacts were produced if the prior step succeeded. Do not use any tools.

agentConfig.name: claude-reporter
agentConfig.instructions: You are writing a concise completion summary. Do not use tools.
